title: Pictures at an Exhibition
description:
Following the death of his mother, Aozora Haru, an art student who is a member of a highly prestigious and selective art program in his school, feels lost. Although fortunate enough to pursue his passion and dreams, the listlessness of his daily life leaves him in a constant state of longing. Besides a group of extremely close friends that he holds dear to him, Haru finds it difficult to attach significant meaning to anything at all, instead seeking solace in the never-ending chambers of his thoughts and dreams. However, unbeknownst to anybody at all, Haru and his friends are bound together in a cruel and twisted, yet beautiful lattice of fate. Through his perspective, unravel the story of a young man staring down the barrel of what it means to be himself. 

- Featuring over 10 hours of visual novel/kinetic novel gameplay, a fully unique OST, FHD backgrounds and sprites.

- Multiple endings and bonus content upon completion.
description_short: Aozora Haru, a troubled, recently orphaned art student, finds it hard to attach much meaning to many of the things in his life. Through the meaningful bonds he has created with the people close to him, however, he begins to understand that life is much more important than it initially seems.
